text: The video shows a gastrointestinal stromal tumor located in the proximal jejunum, with visible ulceration on the mucosal surface.

An elliptical incision is visible where the tumor was resected from the proximal jejunum. The enterotomy is closed transversely, initially using stay sutures of three ovigral, followed by a running closure with Three-O Stratofix barbed suture.
Once everything's complete, the spinal sutures are tied and the resection is complete. Patient did well and started on a regular diet immediately after surgery and had recovered nicely.
